title: ZickZack ORI Edition
description: Recreation of the BastiGHG ORI Pack from CraftAttack 13
body:
>  **THIS IS NOT AN OFFICIAL PACK FROM BASTIGHG IN ANY WAY.** Its Fanmade!

# BastiGHG CraftAttack 13 - ORI Pack



### Custom HUD, Sky and much more!
The weird green stars are not intended, its a client side bug. Credits to [L3_N0X](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/zickzack-ori-red) (I used his creation as a base for many HUD elements. you are the goat Lenox)

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eedb017176de7b8a851702dce34d27841737609_0.webp)



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
### How to get the New BastiGHG ORI Suitcase?
Put a normal totem of undying in an anvil and rename it to "????"
![New ORI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffaa36cac8d405bf23acba9cad54c3ecc70bbe09.png)

### The old "Fake" ORI Suitcase?
Rename a Totem of Undying to "???"
![Old ORI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53be3a77e09ad93ff0ed067b751e566c7453ecd2.png)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The special Weapen
a regular pen? No, put youre Bow in an anvil and rename it to "Kugelschreiber" or "Pen" to get BastiGHG´s special pen.

![PEN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f78f8e29822257e27b0e0e9bd442f99ebbfb150_0.webp)




-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Darker Netherite
Overall less saturated and darker netherite.\
Also changed colors for netherite trim´s on netherite armor. 

![Darker Netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70021e3d5a47db7f6f6aff65111d3c5a5c2cd088.png)


<details>
<summary>Other Features</summary>

No Pumpkin Blur\
Less Rain/Snow Texture


</details>
